title: Dura advertencia del economista Camilo Tiscornia: "No es sostenible que la inflación le gane al tipo de cambio"

content: Ofreciendo mejores tasas de interés, los bancos buscan incentivar las operaciones digitales, que resultan más rápidas y reducen costos operativos.

content: Este innovador estilo de juntar dinero está haciéndose cada vez más popular y requiere de una estricta conducta financiera.

title: La industria automotriz pidió relanzar con urgencia el acuerdo bilateral con Brasil, ante el aluvión de productos chinos
content: En el marco del lanzamiento de la exposición Automechanika, representantes del sector remarcaron la necesidad de darle certidumbre a las inversiones mediante una política sectorial estratégica, con visión de largo plazo.

title: Dólar atrasado, inflación al alza y caída de salarios: advierten por una "anomalía" que tensiona el modelo de Javier Milei
content: Con un tipo de cambio que no para de apreciarse, el poder adquisitivo sigue cayendo. La aceleración de precios y la falta de financiamiento tensionan la sostenibilidad del esquema, un informe del sector financiero.

title: Cuánto cuesta llenar el tanque de nafta con la suba del petróleo por la guerra en Medio Oriente
content: El precio del crudo se disparó globalmente, y Argentina sufrió su impacto. Cuáles son los precios de los combustibles.

content: Economic policymakers are about to gather in Washington to assess the damage President Donald Trump’s war on Iran has caused to growth in the Middle East and beyond.

title: AI Juggernaut Rumbles on Even as Markets Whipsaw
content: The artificial intelligence credit juggernaut keeps pushing forward as the relentless demand for exposure to the industry trumps fears that the conflict in the Middle East is causing energy prices and inflation to rise.

title: US Navy Ships Transit Hormuz Ahead of Mine-Clearing Mission
content: Two US Navy destroyers transited the Strait of Hormuz Saturday, laying the ground for the start of a mine clearing operation, US Central Command said.

title: Three Oil Supertankers Sail Through the Strait of Hormuz
content: Two Chinese supertankers loaded with crude sailed through the Strait of Hormuz hours after a Greek vessel moved through the waterway, marking a significant uptick in oil shipping traffic days after a fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran was announced.

title: Bloomberg This Weekend 4/11/2026
content: The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by International Maritime Organization Secretary General Arsenio Dominguez, The Schork Report Founder and Editor Stephen Schork, The Associated Press International Correspondent Philip Crowther, Going.com Travel Expert Katy Nastro, The Atlantic Staff Writer Vivian Salama, “The Meaning of Your Life” Author Arthur Brooks. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: A Panicked Race for Barrels Is Gripping the Global Oil Market
content: While investors focused on the fragile Iranian ceasefire this week, a desperate scramble for cargoes has been playing out in the oil market, as traders and refiners scour the globe for immediately available supplies.

title: Pointed News Quiz | AI, Super Mario, Retail
content: Tim Stenovec, Christina Ruffini, and Lisa Mateo play Pointed on “Bloomberg This Weekend”! Wager your points, leverage your bets and answer wisely. A new quiz is available to play each week on Bloomberg.com and watch the show LIVE every Saturday and Sunday morning: (Source: Bloomberg)

title: New Era For Space Dawns, As Artemis II Returns
content: NASA's Artemis crew returned to Earth, splashing down in the Pacific Ocean and capping humanity's first return to the moon in more than 50 years. Bloomberg Tech Co-host Ed Ludlow joins Tim Stenovec and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. Watch the show LIVE every Saturday and Sunday morning.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Being Happy In The Digital Era
content: In his new book, "The Meaning of Your Life: Finding Purpose in an Age of Emptiness," best-selling author Arthur Brooks provides tips on how one can find the meaning of life. He joins Tim Stenovec and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. Watch the show LIVE every Saturday and Sunday morning.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NASA’s Artemis II Crew Is Back on Earth
content: Four astronauts splashed down in the Pacific Ocean, marking humanity’s first return from the moon in more than 50 years. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US and Iran locked in marathon talks to end war
content: Historic negotiations aim to end a widening conflict that has stoked a global energy crisis

title: How Iran turned to memes to take on Trump
content: Regime accounts have saturated feeds with snarky online propaganda since US and Israel started bombing campaign

title: The damage wrought to the Middle East’s oil and gas supplies
content: Saudi Arabia and Qatar have both suffered significant damage to production capacity during the US-Israeli war against Iran

title: The tragedy of leisure
content: The combination of AI and small families will create more free time than is good for us

title: Historic Nasa Moon mission returns safely to Earth
content: Artemis voyage entranced world and highlighted space race between US and China

title: Anthropic closes in on OpenAI as US business use surges
content: Divergence reflects company’s recent rapid growth owing to strong interest in its Claude Code products

title: Hungary: the election the world’s big powers want to win
content: Orbán’s defeat would deprive nationalist conservatives across the world of a champion. Opponents see Sunday’s vote as a chance to halt autocracy

title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
content: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.

title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
content: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
content: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk
content: Gain insight on Experian, SoFi Technologies and more in the latest Market Talks covering Financial Services.

title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
content: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on Colombia.

title: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
content: The Yen and Swiss Franc were stronger against the dollar as investors sought safe havens after Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s new AI model hit U.S. tech stocks.

title: Natural Gas Falls on Shifting Weather Forecasts
content: U.S. natural gas futures fell after weekend updates took some of the chill out of early February weather forecasts.

title: Building-Products Distributor QXO Launches Hostile Bid for Beacon
content: QXO is taking its offer directly to shareholders after being rebuffed on several occasions.

title: Natural-Gas Firm Diversified Energy Strikes Deal for Permian Basin Player
content: Maverick Natural Resources has operations in Texas and Oklahoma.

title: What's New This Tax Season That Can Save You Money
content: There are some new wrinkles, especially for those who sell things online or bought an EV.
